name: cli-dispatch
description: Delegate tasks to the right worker CLI — multi-backend delegation hub. Backends: DeepSeek-powered Claude Code (claude-ds), Antigravity / Gemini (agy, ag-agent), and OpenAI Codex CLI (codex, cx-agent). Setup-time backend selection, ds/ag/cx-runner subagents (babysitter+reviewer), single-command ds/ag/cx-agent, session tracking (live monitoring + resume), read-only mode, global MCP isolation, runtime/idle timeout safety net, fully-agentic tasks in isolated worktrees.
